prompt: A high-quality mirror selfie captures a young woman with long, wavy reddish-brown hair and a bold burgundy lip standing in a sleek, contemporary restroom. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="vibrant cobalt blue short-sleeved mesh t-shirt featuring a large, ornate "LV" monogram logo in a marble-textured white and grey finish"} across the chest, which is layered over a dark base. Her look is paired with dark, form-fitting leggings decorated with a vintage-inspired floral print consisting of muted beige and soft pink roses. The background showcases an upscale interior with polished black marble walls, a row of minimalist white rectangular vessel sinks, and polished chrome fixtures. The scene is illuminated by a mix of warm vertical light strips behind the mirrors and a striking neon blue LED glow tracing the base of the vanity, casting a modern, high-contrast light across the charcoal-tiled floor while she holds a black smartphone to frame the shot.
